{{Quote|You have prowess in battle, this cannot be denied. But you Jedi teachings prevent you from having a true warrior's spirit. Jedi couldn't have beaten us in the Mandalorian Wars. It took a fallen jedi to gain that honor.|Tagren to [[Meetra Surik]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref>}}
'''Tagren''' was a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] warrior under [[Canderous Ordo|Mandalore the Preserver]] on [[Dxun/Legends|Dxun]]. In [[3951 BBY]], he was a strong Mandalorian and a great warrior, but he failed to defeat [[Meetra Surik]] in the [[Battle Circle]] within the [[Mandalorian Outpost (Dxun)|camp]] even though the fight was [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed]] and Surik wasn't allowed to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. He wore the [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Neo-Crusader armor|armor]] of the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Neo-Crusaders]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
